ballpark_pal.description: One of the smaller outfields in MLB . Relies on tall fences to keep home runs from getting out of hand. The most wind-receptive venue outside of Wrigley.

weather.description: One of the smaller outfields in MLB . Relies on tall fences to keep home runs from getting out of hand. The most wind-receptive venue outside of Wrigley.

ballpark_pal.description: An extreme outlier of a stadium. Played 4,000 feet higher in altitude than the next closest MLB park. Has an extra-large outfield to accommodate much farther carry distances . Excellent for batter contact as the high altitude limits pitch effectiveness.

weather.description: An extreme outlier of a stadium. Played 4,000 feet higher in altitude than the next closest MLB park. Has an extra-large outfield to accommodate much farther carry distances . Excellent for batter contact as the high altitude limits pitch effectiveness.

ballpark_pal.description: The temporary home of the Athletics. Highly receptive to the usual out-blowing wind , often pairing with the consistent Summer heat . Features a spacious outfield with a tiny right-field fence . Standard to the corners and center, bowed outward in the gaps .

weather.description: The temporary home of the Athletics. Highly receptive to the usual out-blowing wind , often pairing with the consistent Summer heat . Features a spacious outfield with a tiny right-field fence . Standard to the corners and center, bowed outward in the gaps .

ballpark_pal.description: A symmetrical outfield with a highly consistent wind pattern (out to right-center). Plays deep down the lines and particularly shallow to center field.

weather.description: A symmetrical outfield with a highly consistent wind pattern (out to right-center). Plays deep down the lines and particularly shallow to center field.

ballpark_pal.description: One of the smallest outfields in MLB , justified by cooler weather and short carry distances. Strikeouts are boosted by low altitude and a tricky batters eye .

weather.description: One of the smallest outfields in MLB , justified by cooler weather and short carry distances. Strikeouts are boosted by low altitude and a tricky batters eye .

ballpark_pal.description: The highest MLB altitude outside of Coors. Large outfield to accommodate longer carry distance on fly balls. Massive 25-foot center field fence .

weather.description: The highest MLB altitude outside of Coors. Large outfield to accommodate longer carry distance on fly balls. Massive 25-foot center field fence .
